items.title: The 'mind-blowing' swim to survival and abdomen rebuild that saved Sam

children.content: Fourteen-year-old Sam Nai survived a devastating shark attack with a desperate swim for survival, followed by 20 surgeries to reconstruct his abdomen.

items.title: Australians are watching scrutiny of the Bondi attack through a keyhole

children.content: For now, Australians seeking to understand any intelligence gaps, failures, missed warnings and government failings before the Bondi massacre are expected to accept a keyhole view.

children.content: The gold price is now plunging after the precious metal's surge to a record high this year.

items.title: Canadian man accused of selling chemical online admits aiding suicide

children.content: In 2023, Interpol alerted Australian police that packages sold by the man, which contained a lethal substance, were sent to Australia, prompting authorities to check on the welfare of recipients.

items.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes on launch pad during test

children.content: Blue Origin says all personnel are accounted for after experiencing an "anomaly", a term commonly used by rocket companies to describe a launch failure or explosion.

items.title: Protesters arrested as police enter camp at Olympic stadium site

children.content: Five people were taken into custody and a protest camp was broken up at Victoria Park ahead of construction beginning on the $3.6 billion Olympic stadium development.

items.title: Helping 'big personality' marsupial recover after bushfires left them homeless

children.content: Artificial habitats are giving the Kangaroo Island dunnart a chance at recovery, after bushfires left them largely homeless.

items.title: Why younger generations are worse off than baby boomers

children.content: According to research from the Actuaries Institute, inequality between the younger and older generations is widening and could reach record levels within years.

items.title: How women over 60 are still being made the butt of the joke in film

children.content: Films are four times more likely to feature a talking animal lead than a woman over 60. These charts explain the state of film for older women.

items.title: Eight students arrested over deadly girls' school fire in Kenya

children.content: The fire, at the Utumishi Girls' Academy Senior School in Gilgil in west-central Kenya, broke out in the early hours of Thursday morning and also injured 79 students.

items.title: Ski resorts remain optimistic despite forecast for warmer winter

items.title: Are you allowed to make deepfakes of the prime minister?

children.content: Are you allowed to make deepfakes of the prime minister?
You might have seen AI generated memes of Albanese on social media following the announcement of the federal budget.
Whether or not those are legal comes down to what the post is actually communicating to the people seeing it online.

items.title: Mouse plague forces return of COVID-style restrictions at country WA schools

children.content: COVID-style cleaning measures have returned as WA's ongoing mouse plague spreads across multiple country schools.

items.title: Blues complete famous win over Cats as skipper nails golden moment

children.content: Carlton's resurgence under interim coach Josh Fraser continues, with captain Patrick Cripps securing the Blues a third consecutive victory with a four-point win over Geelong at the MCG.

items.title: This comedian has 1.7m followers. He doesn't think it's real

children.content: As a comedian with legions of fans on social media, Will Gibb wishes he didn't still feel the need to legitimise himself. But he does.

items.title: Growing garlic is one of life's slower lessons

items.title: Erin Patterson mushroom trial appeal set after 'miscarriage of justice' claim

items.title: Executive defends appointment of 'Pink Ladies' mentee to Sydney council

items.title: 'Horror night' of airstrikes leaves people in southern Lebanon fearing what's next

children.content: New waves of missile strikes and vast advisories from the Israeli government to evacuate have left residents in Lebanon's south uncertain of where to turn.
